source: aced.gg dev blog 2021-03-28 (Dragons/Midgame, Quaximi) — DOCUMENTED (concept art stage)
map: Realm biome = rocky WASTELAND with patches of FIERY GRASS and scalding LAVA LAKES ('scorching plains'). After defeating the Lord you descend BELOW into a dungeon to reach the titular 'Hearth'.

bosses.name: Firebreather (fire dragon, Lord of the Flaming Hearth)
phases: realm Lord — explore to find his den
bosses.note: One of the FOUR elemental dragons returning from legacy as realm Lords.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED (dev blog, concept stage): Flaming Hearth is a Medium-rank fire world. Lord = FIREBREATHER (fire dragon). Realm-Lord pattern: explore the realm to find his den, defeat him, then descend into the dungeon below to the Hearth. NOTE: this fire 'scorching plains' wasteland matches the 'Scorched Plains' title-card teaser recovered from video.
uncertain: Concept-art stage in 2021 ACED build; exact patterns/stats/drops TBD. Was it in the original 2019 server? (Firebreather dragon is 'from legacy' so yes, in some form.)
confidence: MEDIUM for biome + Lord + enemy concepts (DOCUMENTED); LOW for stats.
